items.title: More time needed for deadly Air India crash inquiry, officials say
items.summary: A statement said "significant progress" had been made into investigating the crash which left 260 people dead a year ago.

items.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims deal to end Iran war near
items.summary: Iran says reports of a deal are "speculative" after the US president says a "great settlement" to end the conflict has been reached.

items.title: Thai Princess Bajrakitiyabha dies after more than three years in coma
items.summary: Princess Bajrakitiyabha, the king's eldest daughter, collapsed in December 2022 while exercising her dogs.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: Pokemon Go實景資料訓練AI模型 助無人機戰區定位
items.summary: 「精靈寶可夢GO」（Pokemon Go）開發商Niantic去年出售遊戲部門後，現正與軟體業者Vantor合作，以這款遊戲中的用戶資料訓練AI模型，盼未來能協助軍用無人機在戰區內定位。 ...…

items.title: 日航又爆空服員喝酒延誤班機 日本政府不忍了
items.summary: 日本航空上月2名空服員因違反內部航空運輸管理規則飲酒，導致航班延誤。對此，日本國土交通省今天對該公司祭出嚴重警告處分。  日本放送協會（NHK）報導，5月23日，兩名原定執飛日本航空（J...…

items.title: 川普宣告美伊達成協議 納坦雅胡感到意外
items.summary: 美國總統川普宣布與伊朗達成「傑出協議」，有望週末在瑞士日內瓦簽署。美國新聞網「Axios」內幕消息指出，以色列總理納坦雅胡對川普宣告達成協議感到驚訝。  不過，以色列總理辦...…
